articles.full_text:
Heat wave awareness camp held in Bhubaneswar
Bhubaneswar (07/06/2026): A heat wave awareness camp was held under ward no-14 of Bhubaneswar Municipal Corporation at Worker Facilitation Centre (WFC), Bhubaneswar, to create awareness among workers and slum residents on heatwave safety and prevention measures organised by Action Aid.During the camp, heatwave awareness leaflets, curd drinks (dahi pani), ORS, and glucose beverages were distributed to workers, children, and community members.More than 200 people attended the camp, received information on heatwave preparedness and hydration practices, and appreciated ActionAid’s timely initiative to support vulnerable communities during the summer season.The camp was coordinated by Saraswati, Shiba, Bhaskar, Gitanjali, Swarnapriya, intern students Akankhya and Sonali, along with slum-level HRDs Golap, Pravasini, and Kousalya.
